name: Ribbonfold
description: Pleated ribbon catching highlights and shadows in alternating bands, re-folding on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: repeating-linear-gradient(90deg, @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)) 0 10%, rgba(0,0,0,0.28) 10% 12%, @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)) 12% 22%, rgba(255,255,255,0.3) 22% 24%); -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
